parents.subject: LU-18576 obdclass: do not update llog's timestamp each time

commit.subject: LU-18611 lfsck: stop all should work
commit.message:
LU-18611 lfsck: stop all should work

'lctl lfsck_stop -A' should notify other nodes to stop lfsck if master
node has stopped.

Signed-off-by: Lai Siyao <lai.siyao@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: If170b24c92089d48363f66ab22f4b7fce670574f
